summary: Project Manager with experience in enterprise implementation readiness, risk mitigation, governance communication, Agile delivery, workflow improvement, testing coordination, and stakeholder alignment across software, finance operations, analytics platforms, and business systems.

experiences.title: Revenue Operations, Governance & Controls Analyst
bullets: Led implementation readiness planning for PAYGO and UE+ expansion, coordinating systems dependencies across $180M ACV.

Monitored transformation risks across dual-system operations, fragmented data, manual workarounds, skill gaps, and competing programs, improving readiness and reducing delivery disruption for enterprise software changes.
Drove governance for Org62-to-OrgSS migration, surfacing dependencies, controls, adoption needs, and stakeholder requirements.

Coordinated approved BPI implementations with operations leaders, Business and Systems teams, SMEs, and frontline stakeholders, strengthening ownership, adoption readiness, and execution visibility across process-improvement workstreams.
Validated Credit and Collections continuity readiness, ownership, dependencies, recovery requirements, and stakeholder responsibilities.

Developed data-backed BPI recommendations, process maps, controls, implementation plans, success measures, and executive readouts aligned with SOX, operating priorities, and scalability requirements for stronger decision quality.

experiences.title: Revenue Strategy & Financial Analysis Analyst
bullets: Led JIRA-based sprint planning and project tracking, aligning stakeholders on timelines, deliverables, risks, and goals.

Monitored delivery risks through JIRA and centralized SharePoint communication, improving governance, documentation, project visibility, and cross-functional collaboration across strategic initiatives for smoother execution across departments.
Coordinated product, development, sales, marketing, and leadership teams around priorities, timelines, risks, and strategy.

experiences.title: Business Systems & Revenue Data Analyst
bullets: Led JIRA-based project lifecycles from conception to execution, tracking milestones, deliverables, deadlines, and teams.

Translated stakeholder feedback and business requirements into platform usability improvements, aligning real estate analytics workflows with client expectations and improving user experience 20% overall.
Executed test scripts validating data flows, calculations, system accuracy, and functionality for reliable SaaS delivery.

experiences.title: Analytics, Automation & Operations Analyst
bullets: Led roadmap planning, sprint execution, backlog prioritization, and JIRA tracking for scalable analytics-platform delivery.

Managed scope, budget, resources, timelines, and delivery risks while negotiating executive priorities, improving governance, resource alignment, and decision quality under execution constraints for product workstreams.
Built Python and Streamlit fraud-detection controls flagging duplicate responses, straight-lining, short durations, and anomalies.

Aligned product workflows, analytics outputs, and client communication with user needs, improving platform usability, service delivery, client relationships, and adoption potential across research operations.

experiences.title: BI, Data Quality & Systems Analyst
bullets: Led migration QA across 22 projects, validating ETL accuracy, data quality, and transition readiness.

Monitored Agile delivery risks through sprint planning, backlog prioritization, Scrum practices, and stakeholder coordination, improving SDLC process efficiency by 60% and strengthening implementation cadence.
Standardized testing documentation, validation workflows, defect reports, and quality practices for traceable application delivery.

Owned quality assurance for a business-critical reinsurance web application, supporting functional accuracy, defect management, release readiness, and reliable client-facing delivery for Marsh and McLennan.
